name: Maya R.
title: The print looks expensive
body: Heavy body, great wash, and the back graphic feels boutique rather than merch.

name: Andre K.
title: Instant outfit upgrade
body: Comfortable straight away. The cobalt panel is bright but still clean.

name: Jules M.
title: Daily pair
body: Soft underfoot and easy to style with cream tees or cargos.

name: Sam T.
title: Great heavy fleece
body: Runs relaxed, exactly the fit I wanted for layering.

name: Nina S.
title: Feels like a gallery piece
body: The print placement makes it feel special without being too loud.
